untranslatable_reason: Signal requires peer market comparison (relative performance across correlated group, peer lagging >3 days, peer strength measurement >2 std devs), which requires cross-instrument analysis not supported by single-instrument indicator library. The core requirement to compare target market vs peer markets cannot be expressed using only allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Translated the intraday reversal component (opens limit-up, falls back, fails to close above open) using upper_wick > lower_wick and close < open as proxy. Volume ratio condition translates directly to vol_ratio_20 < 0.7. Exit at sma_20 (20-day moving average close). Stop loss at 2% per parameters. However, the critical peer comparison logic (lagging >3 days despite positive fundamentals, peer outperformance threshold, peer strength in std devs) cannot be implemented without cross-market data feed.
